query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 7 
WHERE categoryId != 7 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%coquetel%' OR name LIKE '%Coquetel%'
    OR name LIKE '%cocktail%' OR name LIKE '%Cocktail%'
    OR name LIKE '%speakeasy%' OR name LIKE '%Speakeasy%'
    OR name LIKE '%mixolog%' OR name LIKE '%Mixolog%'
    OR name LIKE '%drinks%' OR name LIKE '%Drinks%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 7 
WHERE categoryId != 7 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%coquetel%' OR name LIKE '%Coquetel%'
    OR name LIKE '%cocktail%' OR name LIKE '%Cocktail%'
    OR name LIKE '%speakeasy%' OR name LIKE '%Speakeasy%'
    OR name LIKE '%mixolog%' OR name LIKE '%Mixolog%'
    OR name LIKE '%drinks%' OR name LIKE '%Drinks%');
